sections.title: Founding Designer
sections.text: Designed UX/UI and branding for FanFest, enabling AI-driven loyalty for brands like PSG and Sky Sports.

sections.title: Strategic Partner
sections.text: From MVP to millions of users, supported $3M+ in revenue and $5M+ in funding, while working directly with the CEO on product vision, investor decks, and business design strategy.

sections.title: AI & Engagement
sections.text: Led design for gamification, AI personalization, loyalty systems, and real-time fan experiences. Helped validate product-market fit and drove up to 30% paid conversion in early pilots.
